EmailTemplate.name: ARRH - Contract Offer - Notify candidate
EmailTemplate.subject: Good news for you!
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
THE FACILITY IS HAPPY TO PROCEED.
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
[Client Name] have informed us they would like to proceed your application for the [Contract name] contract to an Offer.
Before we complie the formal Offer, we'd like to confirm a couple of final details:
Travel Accomodation Pay Allowances Work schedule Other condistions
Also please make sure to login to the Alliance Connect app and check your banking details? A separate email named 'Alliance Connect app' includes all the login details and should be in your inbox already.
If you're happy to proceed with the anove details, simply reply to this email and we'll get the formal offer prepared for your review.
Should any additional documentation be required from your end, we'll send a separate request via the portal to submit certificates or similar.
If you have any questions you can always call us on 07 4998 5550.
Kind regards, Your team at Alliance Rural & Remote Health
